purpose: Initializes program variables by reading current date, parameters from SYSIN, and setting default values for expiry days, checkpoint frequencies, and debug flag.
Displays a debug message with the count of summary records read if debug mode is enabled.
Retrieves the next authorization detail segment from the IMS database and updates read count and control flags based on the retrieval status.
Checks if an authorization detail is expired based on the difference between current date and authorization date, and updates counts accordingly if deletion is qualified.
Deletes the current authorization detail segment from the IMS database and increments the deletion counter if successful, otherwise abends.
Reads the next pending authorization detail record from the IMS database and updates read count and flag indicating if more details exist.
Deletes the current pending authorization summary record from the IMS database and increments the deletion counter if successful.
Takes an IMS checkpoint and displays success or failure based on the checkpoint status, resetting the checkpoint counter when display frequency is reached.
Displays a debug message with the current authorization summary read count if debug mode is enabled.
Takes an IMS checkpoint and displays success or failure based on the checkpoint status, resetting the checkpoint counter when display frequency is reached.
Abends the program with return code 16 when called.
Abends the program with return code 16 upon failure to read an authorization detail segment.
Abends the program with return code 16 if deletion of an authorization detail segment fails.
Abends the program with return code 16 if deletion of an authorization summary segment fails.
Abends the program with return code 16 if the checkpoint operation fails.
